raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need command to print last word in file. Use awk or rev. Simpler: awk '{for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) last=$i} END{print last}' file. Or use tail -1 | awk '{print $NF}'. But last word overall, not per line? Probably last word in file. Use awk 'END{print $NF}'. That prints last field of last record. So command: awk 'END{print $NF}' /workspace/dir1/long.txt.
